zh.lifeSummary: Juliana Kinder於1530年出生在英國英格蘭德比夏爾布藍普頓。她於1567年8月與Ralf Heathcote在英國英格蘭德比夏爾斯特費爾德結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。她去世於1586年8月3日在英國德比夏爾斯特費爾德享年56歲，埋葬在英國德比夏爾斯特費爾德聖 瑪麗 安德 哥吉拉 沙也 邱奇。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Juliana Kinder于1530年出生在英国英格兰德比夏爾布藍普頓。她于1567年8月与Ralf Heathcote在英国英格兰德比夏爾斯特費爾德结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。她去世于1586年8月3日在英国德比夏爾斯特費爾德享年56岁，埋葬在英国德比夏爾斯特費爾德聖 瑪麗 安德 哥吉拉 沙也 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: Kinder
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (northwestern): habitational name from Kinder in Hayfield (Derbyshire). The origin of the placename is uncertain.

German: from the genitive plural of Kind ‘child’, possibly denoting someone who had a lot of children, as in Hans der Kinder ‘Hans of the children’ (Eisleben 15th century), or short for some compound such as Kindervater ‘male midwife’ or Kinderfreund ‘one who likes children’.

variants.name: Guenther
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Hans, Otto, Fritz, Gerhard, Lutz, Christoph, Helmut, Klaus, Manfred, Oskar, Ulrich.
German (Günther): from an ancient Germanic personal name composed of gund ‘battle’ + hari, heri ‘army’. Compare Gunther .

variants.name: Kinner
meanings: German: habitational name for someone from a place called Kinne, near Bissingen (Baden-Württemberg).

nameMeanings.name: Juliana
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: feminine form of Julianus ( see Julian ), which was revived in England in the 18th century and has been used occasionally ever since.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

en.lifeSummary: Juliana Kinder was born in 1530, in Brampton, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom. She married Ralf Heathcote in August 1567, in Chesterfield, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. She died on 3 August 1586, in Chesterfield, Derbyshire, England, at the age of 56, and was buried in St Mary and All Saints' Church, Chesterfield, Derbyshire, England.

Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Elle est décédée le 3 août 1586, à Chesterfield, Derbyshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 56 ans, et a été enterrée à St Mary and All Saints' Church, Chesterfield, Derbyshire, Angleterre.

Sie hat im August 1567 in Chesterfield, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom Ralf Heathcote geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Sie starb am 3. Lei sposato Ralf Heathcote nel agosto 1567, nel Chesterfield, Derbyshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. ja.lifeSummary: Juliana Kinderは1530年にイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアブランプトンで生まれた。1567年8月にイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアチェステルフィールドでRalf Heathcoteと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼女は1586年8月3日にイギリスデルブイシュアイアチェステルフィールドで56歳で死去し，イギリスデルブイシュアイアチェステルフィールドスト マリー アンド アル サイントス' チャーチにて埋葬された。

ko.Saint Mary and All Saints, Chesterfield,: 영국 더비실르 체스터필드 스트 메리 앤드 앨 세인츠' c후르치
ko.lifeSummary: Juliana Kinder(은)는 1530년 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 브램프턴에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1567년 8월 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 체스터필드에서 Ralf Heathcote(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1586년 8월 3일 영국 더비실르 체스터필드에서 56세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 더비실르 체스터필드 스트 메리 앤드 앨 세인츠' c후르치에 묻혔다.

Ela casou-se com Ralf Heathcote em agosto de 1567, em Chesterfield, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. ru.Saint Mary and All Saints, Chesterfield,: ст мэри анд алл сеинц' чурч, честирфиелд, дирбишир, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Juliana Kinder родилась в 1530 г. в местности брамптон, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Ralf Heathcote август 1567 г. в местности честирфиелд, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Она умерла 3 августа 1586 г. в местности честирфиелд, дирбишир, Англия в возрасте 56 лет и была похоронена в местности ст мэри анд алл сеинц' чурч, честирфиелд, дирбишир, Англия.
